steps.title: Identify the core disagreement
steps.content: Bremner claims Appia “lacked technical expertise in the use of light in the theater,” but Text 2 opens by directly contradicting this: “Adolphe Appia was not an amateur in the practice of lighting.”

steps.title: Find how the author of Text 2 refutes Bremner
steps.content:
Answer B says Appia “likely gained a level of technical expertise during his time as an apprentice”—exactly what Text 2 demonstrates through Appia's hands-on experience observing portable lighting devices under a specialist.

The other options either introduce claims unsupported by Text 2 (technicians dismissing him, practitioners admiring him) or discuss entirely unrelated topics (music and sound).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
